calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-05-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff, Michael Brown, is present, appearing in pro per.

Defendant Spencina Jackson is present.
Marisa Deutsch representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 1101 Gilman Ave. San Francisco California.

This case settled, the trial date of 12/8/08 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Wil Chen, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
